pi_items.source: Task description explicitly instructs the agent to save/export the project as an XML file to '~/Projects/output/project_with_holidays.xml'.

Task description explicitly provides these dates to be added as holidays. Verified using standard calendar that Feb 17, 2025 is indeed Presidents' Day (3rd Monday) and May 26, 2025 is Memorial Day (last Monday).

privileged_info_summary: The correct output path to save the modified XML project is '/home/ga/Projects/output/project_with_holidays.xml'. The expected holidays to be added as calendar exceptions are Presidents' Day on '2025-02-17' and Memorial Day on '2025-05-26'. These dates correctly match the 2025 US Federal calendar.
